data.body: Plan-review PASS (blocking 0), signed at 9b7bbf1e; claimed. Advisories triaged: file-impact (set); ac-quality (minor wording, accepting); two E5 (test the new uses ops + the registry->criteria assembly + overlay when-resolution) -> will be covered by test_plan_review_workflow.py (offline run + assembly + overlay tests). Implementing on the B3 workflow-as-gate pattern, the epic-A batch construct + B1 ProductionBatchRunner, reusing det_floor/registry/passes.
